translations.fr: Je veux plus de café, s’il vous plaît.
translations.it: Vorrei ancora del caffè, per favore.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thêm cà phê, làm ơn.
translations.ar: أريد مزيدًا من القهوة، من فضلك.
translations.nl: Ik wil graag meer koffie, alstublieft.
translations.uk: Я хочу ще кави, будь ласка.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ha mer kaffe, takk.
translations.sv: Jag vill ha mer kaffe, tack.
translations.ro: Vreau mai multă cafea, te rog.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne have mere kaffe, tak.
translations.ja: コーヒーをもう少しください。

tokens.explanation: Finite first-person singular present indicative form of the verb meaning 'to want'.
Adverb expressing comparison or increase; here it modifies the amount of café.
Common noun naming the beverage; masculine singular form.
Preposition introducing a polite request formula.
Common noun in the fixed expression 'por favor'; masculine singular.

translations.fr: Elle a besoin de plus de temps aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi ha bisogno di più tempo.
translations.pt: Ela precisa de mais tempo hoje.
translations.tr: Bugün daha fazla zamana ihtiyacı var.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy cần thêm thời gian.
translations.ar: هي تحتاج إلى مزيد من الوقت اليوم.
translations.nl: Ze heeft vandaag meer tijd nodig.
translations.nb: Hun trenger mer tid i dag.
translations.id: Dia butuh lebih banyak waktu hari ini.
translations.sv: Hon behöver mer tid i dag.
translations.ro: Ea are nevoie de mai mult timp astăzi.
translations.da: Hun har brug for mere tid i dag.
translations.ja: 彼女は今日はもっと時間が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Third-person feminine singular personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Finite third-person singular present indicative form of the verb meaning 'to need'.
Adverb of degree expressing a greater quantity or amount.
Common noun meaning 'time'; masculine singular.
Adverb of time indicating the present day.

sentences.target: Pon más sal en la sopa.

translations.es: Pon más sal en la sopa.
translations.en: Put more salt in the soup.
translations.fr: Mets plus de sel dans la soupe.
translations.de: Gib mehr Salz in die Suppe.
translations.ar: ضع المزيد من الملح في الحساء.
translations.nl: Doe meer zout in de soep.
translations.el: Βάλε κι άλλο αλάτι στη σούπα.
translations.id: Tambahkan lebih banyak garam ke dalam sup.
translations.sv: Lägg i mer salt i soppan.
translations.ro: Pune mai multă sare în supă.
translations.ja: スープにもっと塩を入れて。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular affirmative imperative form of the verb meaning 'to put/place'.
Adverb of degree modifying the quantity of sal.
Common noun referring to the seasoning; feminine in Spanish, though article is absent here.
Preposition introducing the location or target container.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with sopa.
Common noun meaning 'soup'; feminine singular.

sentences.target: Tengo más tareas para esta tarde.

translations.es: Tengo más tareas para esta tarde.
translations.en: I have more homework for this afternoon.
translations.fr: J’ai plus de devoirs pour cet après-midi.
translations.de: Ich habe heute Nachmittag mehr Hausaufgaben.
translations.it: Ho più compiti per questo pomeriggio.
translations.ko: 나는 오늘 오후에 할 숙제가 더 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天下午还有更多作业。
translations.yue: 我今個下晝仲有更多功課。
translations.ru: У меня сегодня на вторую половину дня ещё больше домашних заданий.
translations.pt: Tenho mais tarefas para esta tarde.
translations.he: יש לי עוד שיעורי בית להיום אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Bu öğleden sonra için daha fazla ödevim var.
translations.vi: Tôi có thêm bài tập về nhà cho chiều nay.
translations.ar: لديّ المزيد من الواجبات لهذه الظهيرة.
translations.uk: У мене на сьогоднішній вечір ще більше домашніх завдань.
translations.hu: Erre a délutánra még több házi feladatom van.
translations.hi: मेरे पास आज दोपहर के लिए और होमवर्क है।
translations.pl: Mam więcej pracy domowej na dzisiejsze popołudnie.
translations.el: Έχω κι άλλες εργασίες για σήμερα το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Jeg har mer lekser til i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Saya punya lebih banyak PR untuk sore ini.
translations.sv: Jag har mer läxor till i eftermiddag.
translations.ro: Am mai multe teme pentru după-amiaza asta.
translations.cs: Na dnešní odpoledne mám ještě víc domácích úkolů.
translations.da: Jeg har mere lektier til i eftermiddag.
translations.fi: Minulla on vielä enemmän läksyjä tälle iltapäivälle.
translations.ja: 私は今日の午後にまだ宿題がもっとあります。

tokens.explanation: Finite first-person singular present indicative form of the verb meaning 'to have'.
Adverb of degree indicating a greater number or amount.
Common noun meaning 'tasks'; feminine plural.
Preposition introducing purpose or time reference.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with tarde.
Common noun referring to the afternoon; feminine singular.

en: Put more salt in the soup.
I have more homework for this afternoon.
